channel.title: Cyber Security Agency of Singapore — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Cyber Security Agency of Singapore (csa).

item.title: CVE-2026-6888 · 7.2 HIGH — SQL Injection Vulnerability
item.description: Successful exploitation of the SQL injection vulnerability could allow a remote authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary commands via a specific interface, potentially enabling the attacker to access, modify, or delete sensitive information within…

item.title: CVE-2026-3008 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Vulnerability in Notepad++
item.description: Successful exploitation of the string injection vulnerability could allow an attacker to obtain memory address information or crash the application.

item.title: CVE-2026-3006 · 7 HIGH — Race Condition Vulnerability
item.description: Successful exploitation of the race condition vulnerability could allow an attacker to trigger a kernel heap overflow, potentially leading to local privilege escalation and granting system-level access to the affected software.

item.title: CVE-2026-3007 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
item.description: Successful exploitation of the stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary JavaScript on any user account that has access to Koollab LMS’ courselet feature.

item.title: CVE-2025-52694 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Execution of arbitrary SQL commands
item.description: Successful exploitation of the SQL injection vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary SQL commands on the vulnerable service when it is exposed to the Internet, potentially affecting data confidentiality, inte…

item.title: CVE-2025-52691 · 10 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️ — Upload Arbitrary Files
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated attacker to upload arbitrary files to any location on the mail server, potentially enabling remote code execution.

item.title: CVE-2025-52692 · 8.8 HIGH — Bypass Authentication
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an attacker with local network access to send a specially crafted URL to access certain administration functions without login credentials.

item.title: CVE-2025-48464 · 4.7 MEDIUM — Exposure of Sensitive Information
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated attacker to gain access to a victim’s Sync account data such as account credentials and email protection information.

item.title: CVE-2025-52690 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Command Injection Vulnerability in the OmniAccess Stellar over UDP Service
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary commands as root, potentially leading to the loss of confidentiality, integrity, availability, and full control of the access point.

item.title: CVE-2025-52689 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Weak Session ID Check in the OmniAccess Stellar Web Management Interface
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated attacker to obtain a valid session ID with administrator privileges by spoofing the login request, potentially allowing the attacker to modify the behaviour of the access poi…

item.title: CVE-2025-52688 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Command Injection Vulnerability in the OmniAccess Stellar Web Management Interface
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an attacker to inject commands with root privileges on the access point, potentially leading to the loss of confidentiality, integrity, availability, and full control of the access point.

item.title: CVE-2025-52687 · 2.4 LOW — JavaScript Injection Vulnerability in the OmniAccess Stellar Web Management Interface
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an attacker with administrator credentials for the access point to inject malicious JavaScript into the payload of web traffics, potentially leading to session hijacking and denial-of-service (…

item.title: CVE-2025-48470 · 4.1 MEDIUM — Stored Cross site Scripting (XSS)
item.description: Successful exploitation of the stored cross-site scripting vulnerability could allow an attacker to inject malicious scripts into device fields and executed in other users’ browser, potentially leading to session hijacking, defacement, credential the…

item.title: CVE-2025-48469 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Unauthenticated Firmware Upload
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated attacker to upload firmware through a public update page, potentially leading to backdoor installation or privilege escalation.

item.title: CVE-2025-48468 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Open JTAG Debug Port
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an attacker that has physical access to interface with JTAG to inject or modify firmware.

item.title: CVE-2025-48467 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Denial of Service via Malformed Modbus Packets
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an attacker to cause repeated reboots, potentially leading to remote denial-of-service and system unavailability.

item.title: CVE-2025-48466 · 8.1 HIGH — Modbus Command Injection without Authentication
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to send Modbus TCP packets to manipulate Digital Outputs, potentially allowing remote control of relay channel which may lead to operational or safety risks.

item.title: CVE-2025-48463 · 3.1 LOW — Unencrypted HTTP Communication
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an attacker to intercept data and conduct session hijacking on the exposed data as the vulnerable product uses unencrypted HTTP communication, potentially leading to unauthorised access or data…

item.title: CVE-2025-48462 · 4.2 MEDIUM — Login Session Exhaustion
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an attacker to consume all available session slots and block other users from logging in, thereby preventing legitimate users from gaining access to the product.

item.title: CVE-2025-48461 · 5 MEDIUM — Weak Session Cookie Entropy
item.description: Successful exploitation of the vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated attacker to conduct brute force guessing and account takeover as the session cookies are predictable, potentially allowing the attackers to gain root, admin or user access an…
